differential_diagnoses: Metastatic malignancy with central nervous system involvement
next_steps: Initiate empiric antifungal therapy (e.g., liposomal amphotericin B and flucytosine) and broad-spectrum antibiotics (covering Listeria)
Obtain serum cortisol, 24-hour urinary free cortisol, and plasma ACTH levels
Send cerebrospinal fluid for fungal and mycobacterial cultures, India ink, and cryptococcal antigen
Consult endocrinology for management of hypercortisolism
Urgent neurosurgical consultation for consideration of brain biopsy if infectious workup remains negative
Consider fine-needle aspiration of the adrenal nodule if suspicion of ectopic ACTH persists and other diagnostic measures are inconclusive
